drl:
rule "R0"
salience 6
no-loop
when
    (or (and T1(f1 > -2.0, f0 matches "ab") T1(f3 == false) T1(f0 <= "zz", $b0_2_0 : f2)) (and T1(f1 > -2.0, f0 not in ("b", "a")) T1(f3 == false) T1(f0 <= "zz", $b0_2_0 : f2)))
then
end
rule "R1"
salience -3
when
    T0(f0 != "ab", f0 > "")
    $p1_1 : T0($b1_1_0 : f0, $b1_1_1 : f0)
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
    insert(new T1($p1_1.getF0(), -0.5, 11, true));
    insert(new T1("beta", 6.0, 100, true));
end
rule "R2"
when
    T0($b2_0_0 : f0, $b2_0_1 : f0)
    accumulate( T0(f0 != "ab", f0 == $b2_0_0); $a2_1 : count() )
    T0(!(f0 contains "z"))
then
    insert(new T1($b2_0_1, $a2_1, $a2_1, false));
end
rule "R3"
agenda-group "ga"
when
    T0($b3_0_0 : f0, $b3_0_1 : f0)
then
    insert(new T1($b3_0_0, 3.0, -1000000007, true));
end
rule "R4"
when
    (or (and T0(f0 != "ab", f0 > "") T0($b4_1_0 : f0, $b4_1_1 : f0)) (and T0(f0 != "ab", f0 > "zz") T0($b4_1_0 : f0, $b4_1_1 : f0)))
then
    insert(new T1($b4_1_1, 4.0, 100, false));
end
rule "R5"
agenda-group "gb"
when
    T1(f3 != true, $b5_0_0 : f2, $b5_0_1 : f1)
then
end
query Q0(boolean $qa0_0, long $qa0_1, String $qa0_2)
    ( $qp0_0 : T1(f3 == $qa0_0, f2 == $qa0_1, $qb0_0 : f2, $qb0_1 : f3) )
    or
    ( $qp0_1 : T0(f0 == $qa0_2, f0 != "alpha", $qb0_2 : f0, $qb0_3 : f0) and $qp0_2 : T1(f1 < -1.0, f0 >= $qb0_2, $qb0_4 : f1, $qb0_5 : f1) )
end

query Q1(String $qa1_0, String $qa1_1, double $qa1_2)
    $qp1_0 : T0(f0 == $qa1_0, f0 == $qa1_1, f0 <= "ab", $qb1_0 : f0)
    $qp1_1 : T0(f0 < $qb1_0, f0 == $qb1_0)
    $qp1_2 : T1(f1 == $qa1_2, f3 != true, f0 <= "a", f0 > $qb1_0, $qb1_1 : f0, $qb1_2 : f3)
end

rule QR0 salience 2
when
    T1(f2 <= -5)
    T1(f3 != true, $qr0_b0 : f1)
    ?Q0(true, 100, "ab";)
    ?Q0(true, 100, "ab";)
then
    insert(new QOut(1, 5, $qr0_b0, "zz", false));
end

rule QR1
when
    T1($qr1_b0 : f2)
    ?Q0(true, $qr1_b0, "";)
    ?Q1("beta", $qr1_x0, $qr1_x1;)
    T0(f0 == $qr1_x0)
then
    insert(new QOut(2, -4, 4.5, $qr1_x0, true));
end

rule QR2 salience -5
when
    T1(f2 <= -3, $qr2_b0 : f2)
    ?Q1("", "beta", 4.0;)
    ?Q0(true, $qr2_b0, "ab";)
then

rule QRtwin salience 6
when
    T1(f2 <= -3, $qr2_b0 : f2)
    ?Q1("", "beta", 4.0;)
    ?Q0(true, $qr2_b0, "ab";)
then
